name: Marinade for Flank Steak
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine all ingredients in a bowl and stir until well mixed.
2. Place flank steak in the marinade, ensuring it is fully coated.
3. Cover the bowl with plastic wrap and refrigerate for at least 8 hours, preferably overnight.
4. Preheat a grill to medium-low heat.
5. Remove the steak from the marinade and pat dry with paper towels.
6. Grill the steak for 8 minutes on each side until desired doneness is reached.
7. Slice the cooked steak against the grain like roast beef.
